basic_details.job_title: Shipping Corporation of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Secretarial Officer, Secretarial Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Shipping Corporation of India (SCI) has officially announced the Senior Secretarial Officer / Secretarial Officer Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. HR 02/2026 at the official website https://shipindia.com . Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 34 years (Senior Secretarial Officer) and 32 years (Secretarial Officer) as on 01.04.2026 and hold qualification as a Company Secretary with Associate / Fellow membership of Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) can now submit their online applications. The application proce

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max age 34 for Senior Secretarial Officer and 32 for Secretarial Officer as on 01.04.2026
age_limit.details: Senior Secretarial Officer: Maximum age 34 years as on 01.04.2026 Secretarial Officer: Maximum age 32 years as on 01.04.2026

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified Company Secretary having Associate / Fellow membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries (ICSI).
qualification.details: Senior Secretarial Officer: Qualified Company Secretary having Associate / Fellow membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries (ICSI). Two (2) years post qualification experience. One (1) year experience in a Listed company is desirable. Secretarial Officer: Qualified Company Secretary having Associate / Fellow membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries (ICSI). Fresher with requisite educational experience.

salary_details.details: Senior Secretarial Officer: Rs. 80,000/- per month. Secretarial Officer: Rs. 60,000/- per month. Consolidated Emoluments includes employee's Provident Fund contribution.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility criteria (Educational Qualification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Shipping Corporation of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Shipping Corporation of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Shipping Corporation of India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Shipping Corporation of India Recruitment 2026 is 20-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Secretarial Officer and Secretarial Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies. Specifically, there are 2 vacancies for the Senior Secretarial Officer post and 2 vacancies for the Secretarial Officer post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is being a Qualified Company Secretary having Associate or Fellow membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries (ICSI). A graduate degree is also a prerequisite.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Secretarial Officer and Secretarial Officer posts?
faq.answer: For the Senior Secretarial Officer post, the maximum age limit is 34 years, and for the Secretarial Officer post, it is 32 years, as of 01.04.2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 80,000/- per month for Senior Secretarial Officer and Rs. 60,000/- per month for Secretarial Officer. This consolidated emolument includes employee's Provident Fund contribution.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for the Secretarial Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Secretarial Officer post, candidates who are freshers with the requisite educational experience are eligible to apply. No specific prior work experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Shipping Corporation of India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: firstly, shortlisting of candidates based on their eligibility criteria (educational qualification, age, and experience), followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Shipping Corporation of India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the SCI website. Candidates need to fill the application form, upload necessary documents, and submit it before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee payment.
